evals.prompt: Please review the design of the user's current project webpage
evals.expected_output: A review covering visual design, UX flow, code quality, accessibility, mobile responsiveness, and SEO with scores and main issues for each dimension.

evals.prompt: Review this code snippet for potential issues: <button onclick="alert('hi')">Click me</button>
evals.expected_output: A review noting code quality issues (inline event handler), accessibility (missing aria-label), and mobile responsiveness (touch target size).

evals.prompt: Give feedback on a mobile app dashboard that has hidden navigation and no hamburger menu.
evals.expected_output: A review focusing on mobile responsiveness (hidden navigation, lack of hamburger menu) and possibly UX flow (navigation clarity).
